memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of Peter Foster dated 1609,  Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England
Will of Peter Foster
memoryArtifacts.description: Will of Peter Foster was probated 13 July 1609.  In it he mentions by name his wife Ellen and children Richard, Thomas, Katherine Tompkins, Elizabeth, Margery Cooke, Isabel,  and Ales Skinner.

sourceList.title: Helen Greenway in entry for Patricke Foster, "England Marriages, 1538–1973"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Helene Newton Greenway於大約1566年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾文時，她的父親Sir Anthony Greneway21歲，母親Lady Winifred Harcourt23歲。她和Peter Patricke Foster至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1609年4月9日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helene Newton Greenway于大约1566年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾文时，她的父亲Sir Anthony Greneway21岁，母亲Lady Winifred Harcourt23岁。她和Peter Patricke Foster至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1609年4月9日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greenway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived by a grassy path, from Middle English grene, grein ‘green’ + weye ‘path’ (see Way ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Dutch Groeneweg or German Grüneweg, Gröneweg, topographic names with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Way
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

nameMeanings.name: Helene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now in fairly frequent use in the English-speaking world, usually without the accents.

variants.name: Helena
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: Newton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of the very numerous places so called, from Old English nēowe ‘new’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. This is said to be the commonest of all English place names. The most famous bearer of the surname is probably Sir Isaac Newton ( 1642–1727 ), the English scientist. As a given name it was modestly popular in the United States in the early part of the 20th century but has since fallen from favour.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Helene Newton Greenway was born about 1566, in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Anthony Greneway, was 21 and her mother, Lady Winifred Harcourt, was 23. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Peter Patricke Foster. She died on 9 April 1609, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helene Newton Greenway est née environ 1566, à Wing, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Anthony Greneway, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Winifred Harcourt, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Peter Patricke Foster. Elle est décédée le 9 avril 1609, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helene Newton Greenway um 1566 in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Anthony Greneway 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Winifred Harcourt 23. Sie hatte mit Peter Patricke Foster mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. April 1609 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helene Newton Greenway è nata il circa 1566 nel Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Anthony Greneway, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Winifred Harcourt, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Peter Patricke Foster. Morì il 9 aprile 1609, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helene Newton Greenwayが約1566年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィングで生まれた時，父Sir Anthony Grenewayは21歳，母Lady Winifred Harcourtは23歳であった。彼女はPeter Patricke Fosterとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1609年4月9日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helene Newton Greenway(이)가 대략 1566년 영국 벅잉함실르 윙에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Anthony Greneway(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Winifred Harcourt(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Peter Patricke Foster(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1609년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helene Newton Greenway nasceu aproximadamente 1566, em Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Anthony Greneway, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Winifred Harcourt, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Peter Patricke Foster. Ela faleceu em 9 de abril de 1609, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helene Newton Greenway родилась около 1566 г. в местности виг, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Anthony Greneway было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Winifred Harcourt, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Peter Patricke Foster. Она умерла 9 апреля 1609 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helene Newton Greenway nació aproximadamente 1566, en Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Anthony Greneway, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Winifred Harcourt, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Peter Patricke Foster. Murió el 9 de abril de 1609, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
